section.heading: Remedial action management program
section.chapeau: The Administrator, in coordination with the National Council on Disability and the National Advisory Council, shall establish a remedial action management program to—

paragraph.content: analyze training, exercises, and real-world events to identify and disseminate lessons learned and best practices;
generate and disseminate, as appropriate, after action reports to participants in exercises and real-world events; and
conduct remedial action tracking and long-term trend analysis.
